svg.script: function hghl(el) { for ( var i in el ){ var elem = document.getElementById(el[i]); if ( elem != null ) elem.setAttribute('class','highlight'); } } function uhghl(el) { for ( var i in el ){ var elem = document.getElementById(el[i]); if ( elem != null ) elem.setAttribute('class','unhighlight'); } }

g.title: Read column and table comments by hovering the columns and tables. Zoom with CTRL+whell mouse button, pan by dragging the diagram with the right-mouse button

text.tspan: Read schema comments as mouse-over tooltips

g.title: ⧉ user_id * int ↙ person( create_by ) ↙ person( update_by ) ↙ content( update_by ) ↙ transaction_list( user_id ) ↙ reviews( user_id ) ↙ playlist( user_id ) ↙ user_content( user_id )

🔗 Referred by person ( create_by -> user_id ) Referred by person ( update_by -> user_id ) Referred by content ( update_by -> user_id ) Referred by transaction_list ( user_id ) Referred by reviews ( user_id ) Referred by playlist ( user_id ) Referred by user_content ( user_id )
⧉ episode_id * int ↙ media_path( episode_id ) ↙ content_resource( episode_id )
🔗 Referred by media_path ( episode_id ) Referred by content_resource ( episode_id )

⧉ tier_id * int ↙ app_user( tier_id ) ↙ subscription_detail( tier_id )
🔗 Referred by app_user ( tier_id ) Referred by subscription_detail ( tier_id )
⧉ user_id * int ↗ app_user( user_id ) ↙ playlist_item( user_id, playlist_id )
🔗 References app_user ( user_id ) Referred by playlist_item ( user_id, playlist_id )
⧉ content_id int ↗ content( content_id ) ↙ episode( content_id, season_num )
🔗 References content ( content_id ) Referred by episode ( content_id, season_num )
⧉ transaction_id * int ↙ transaction_detail( transaction_id ) ↙ subscription_detail( transaction_id )
🔗 Referred by transaction_detail ( transaction_id ) Referred by subscription_detail ( transaction_id )
⧉ country_id * int ↙ app_user( country_id ) ↙ content( country_id )
🔗 Referred by app_user ( country_id ) Referred by content ( country_id )
